name: coOnNodeChangedState
title: coOnNodeChangedState
description: This function is called if the state of the node changes. This can be triggered by the functions coSetLocalState, coStartUp, coShutDown or via the network.

parameters.name: newState
parameters.description: New state of the node:4 - stopped5 - operational6 - reset node7 - reset communication127 - pre-operational
